*Now working session is ended, feel free to review and add any feedback on the solution draft.*

Get latest changes from default branch, note that codex support and claude support has changed significantly.

We need to carefully double check, that we don't break any existing code, and without `--use-agent-commander` everything will work as it was working before.

Yet with `--use-agent-commander` we should use latest version of https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander for all tools - claude, codex, agent, opencode, but only if this option selected. Also we need to make sure that when  `--use-agent-commander` we support each and every feature we have, but control tools (claude, codex, agent, opencode) only via our https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander, not directly. But only if `--use-agent-commander` is enabled.

Please also carefully list all the features we need in hive-mind, and we have in agent-commander, and if any feature is missing, make a code draft, but also report the issue to https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander, so I can pause this pull request, to fix all issues and add all missing features.

So we fully support `--use-agent-commander` when it is enabled.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context autocompacts and you can continue indefinetely, do as much as possible in one go, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done. For issues use gh tool and create them directly on https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander if needed.

## Working session summary

Completed and pushed.

PR: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1044  
Commit: `49f79f9b6d71f22ed5a2ad4374cea4979d289895`

What changed:
- Merged latest `main` and resolved conflicts.
- Added hidden, default-off `--use-agent-commander`.
- Preserved existing default embedded tool behavior when the flag is absent.
- Routed solve/restart tool execution through `agent-commander@0.4.3` only when enabled.
- Added regression tests and issue research under `docs/case-studies/issue-1043`.
- Opened upstream parity follow-ups:
  - https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander/issues/29
  - https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander/issues/30

Verification:
- Local `npm run lint` passed.
- Local `npm test` passed: all 80 selected test files.
- Local line-limit check passed with existing near-limit warnings.
- GitHub Actions run `25203627030` passed, including Docker: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/actions/runs/25203627030
- PR is no longer draft, is `MERGEABLE`, and merge state is `CLEAN`.
- Working tree is clean.
